channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Examining Antisemitism in Australia After the Bondi Beach Attack
item.description: The Royal Commission on Antisemitism and Social Cohesion was set up in January 2026 following the tragic Bondi Beach terror attack. Chaired by former High Court justice Virginia Bell, the commission a...

item.title: Vice Ganda Withdraws from Jessica Sanchez's Upcoming Concert
item.description: Filipino comedian and TV host Vice Ganda will no longer be part of the upcoming Jessica Sanchez concert, scheduled to take place at the Araneta Coliseum. While the reason for his withdrawal has not be...

item.title: PQ alleges Conservative party may have breached election laws in Arthabaska by-election
item.description: The Parti Québécois (PQ) has raised concerns that the Conservative Party may have violated election laws during the recent Arthabaska by-election. The PQ claims there were irregularities in the conduc...

item.title: Texas Children’s Hospital to Open Detransition Clinic Following DOJ Settlement
item.description: Texas Children’s Hospital in Houston will establish the nation’s first dedicated 'detransition clinic' as part of a $10 million settlement with the Department of Justice and the state of Texas. The se...

item.title: Tinubu Confirms Nigeria-US Forces Killed Senior ISIS Commander in Lake Chad
item.description: President Bola Ahmed Tinubu don announce say Nigerian and United States forces don carry out successful joint operation wey result for the killing of senior Islamic State commander, Abu-Bilal Al-Manuk...

item.title: Visiting St Carlo Acutis' Tomb: Italy's Growing Pilgrimage Destination
item.description: Assisi, a small town in Italy's Umbria region, has emerged as a notable pilgrimage destination following the beatification of Carlo Acutis, an English-born Italian teenager who died from leukaemia at ...

item.title: Technical Fault Causes Significant Baggage Delays at Heathrow Airport
item.description: Heathrow Airport experienced severe baggage delays yesterday, leaving passengers frustrated as they waited up to five hours for their luggage, and some were instructed to leave the airport without the...

item.title: Tinubu Confirms Nigeria-US Operation Eliminated Senior ISIS Leader in Lake Chad Basin
item.description: President Bola Tinubu don confirm say Nigerian forces work together with United States military to carry out one important operation against terrorists for Lake Chad Basin. According to him, the missi...

item.title: NCB seizes Captagon drugs worth ₹182 crore and extradites international trafficker
item.description: The Narcotics Control Bureau (NCB) has successfully made its first-ever seizure of Captagon, commonly referred to as the 'Jihadi Drug', valued at ₹182 crore, under 'Operation Ragepill', Union Home Min...

item.title: Carolina Panthers Announced 2026 Schedule with Three Prime-Time Games and Home Opener
item.description: The Carolina Panthers' 2026 NFL schedule has been released, offering fans an exciting season with increased national exposure. The team will feature in three prime-time games, the most since 2016, inc...

item.title: Celebrating the Life and Legacy of Actress Maria Schell
item.description: Maria Schell was a luminous presence in international cinema, renowned for her extraordinary emotional range and expressive performances. Born in Austria, Schell became one of the defining actresses o...

item.title: Two Additional Arrests Made in Home Affairs Corruption Probe
item.description: South Africa's Department of Home Affairs has confirmed the arrest of two more individuals as part of an ongoing crackdown on corruption and fraud within the department. This brings the total number o...

item.title: US and Nigerian forces reportedly kill senior ISIS commander in Africa
item.description: On Saturday, May 16, 2026, former US President Donald Trump claimed say American forces, together with Nigerian military, carry out one joint operation wey target senior ISIS commander, Abu-Bilal al-M...

item.title: Fans' Reactions Overshadow the Football Matches in Tanzania
item.description: Watching football in Tanzania no be small thing, especially when you dey follow your team for bar or at home on TV. Sometimes e better than stadium because slow-motion replays dey show the skills of t...

item.title: Rising vehicle maintenance and fuel costs challenge Nova Scotia drivers
item.description: Drivers in Nova Scotia are increasingly feeling the financial strain of vehicle ownership, with rising maintenance costs and higher gas prices affecting their budgets. Statistics Canada reports that v...

item.title: Ryan May Gets Emotional at Yeng Constantino’s Upcoming Concert
item.description: Ryan May, known for his appearances on 'It’s Showtime,' shared that he is considering showing his emotions at Yeng Constantino's much-anticipated 'Byaheng Bente' concert. During a segment on the popul...

item.title: Lucknow University Professor Arrested Over Alleged Paper Leak and Misconduct
item.description: A news report emerged regarding an incident at Lucknow University involving a professor allegedly sharing exam papers with a student and using inappropriate language. According to sources, the univers...

item.title: The Life and Controversial Legacy of Thomas Midgley Jr.
item.description: Thomas Midgley Jr., born in 1889 in Dayton, Ohio, was an influential American chemical engineer whose inventions had a profound and lasting impact on the 20th century, though often with devastating co...

item.title: Malindi Port starts direct cargo operations via SGR to Dodoma
item.description: Dar es Salaam’s Malindi area of the port has officially started handling cargo through the Standard Gauge Railway (SGR), after 99.7% of the rail works in the area were finished. This new development i...

item.title: Key Lessons from Nigeria’s Power Minister Confirmation Hearing
item.description: I attend the Senate confirmation hearing for Nigeria's new Minister of Power, Joseph O. Tegbe, and e clear say this one no be small matter at all. The hearing show say Nigeria electricity wahala no de...
